title: RBI (Commercial Banks – Capital Charge for Credit Risk – Standardised Approach) Directions, 2026
description:
The Directions introduce a structured framework for calculating risk-weighted assets under Basel III norms. The ruling ensures improved consistency, transparency, and risk sensitivity in capital adequacy.
The post RBI (Commercial Banks – Capital Charge for Credit Risk – Standardised Approach) Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
